stemHtml: Before landing, you tell the ATSU: "Please call us a taxi, arriving at 10:45." Is this a Flight Regularity Message?

options.a: Yes — it is information for the operator's representative.
options.b: Yes — provided the ATSU handles ground services.
options.c: No — individual passenger or crew requirements are not admissible in this message type.
options.d: No — such messages can only be passed after landing.
